finding: Held-out success COLLAPSED to 3/20 (Claude 3/10, DeepSeek 0/10) vs 8/10 on known library lemmas — direct evidence the 8/10 was RECALL. The non-trivial polynomial identities (hf01/hf05/hf08) all failed because the models reached for Mathlib's `ring`, absent in Lean core. The semantic novelty assessor flags every known-lemma proof likely_recall=True/surface_novel=False and the held-out accepts surface_novel=True (hf09/hf10 also likely_recall=False) — it reduces the memorization false-positive the plain Jaccard could not catch.
